description: Style NoteWith this T-shirt from adidas with Climacool and Formation enabled technology, you can conveniently ignore the heat and keep your focus right where it needs to be. With a superior performance fabric which keeps cool air flowing in and heat and sweat flowing out, you can stay dry and comfortable, performing at your peak in even the most heated competition. On a day off, pair it with denims and cool sneakers to look your casual best.Product DetailsOrange polo T-shirt with short sleeves with printed branding on the right sleeve, is engineered with climacool and formation technology, buttoned chest placket, printed branding on the left chest, mesh panels on the sides and at the back and adidas patented stripes at the back Material and Care100% polyesterMachine wash at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanDry in shadeCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitLeaner fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
